falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates extreme momentum, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a blowoff top scenario.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above $50,000 (BTC) with >100k BTC volume on 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above key resistance with sustained volume would invalidate the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by confirming a bullish trend reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug reaches 90% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Reaching 90% similarity to a confirmed bottom pattern would falsify the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by indicating a high-probability reversal point.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
